Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}The azuki desserts here are amazing. Red bean is so oishii![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I love the culture of Nihon! Japan is sugoi—amazing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Japanese culture is number one—ichiban! I am so happy I came here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}My home has delicious food too, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Japanese sweets are so good! I am in love—daisuki![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Japanese culture is number one—ichiban! I am so happy I came here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}You don't think so? But I think you should be proud to live in Nihon![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Japanese culture is number one—ichiban! I am so happy I came here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I want to learn everything about Nihon and become Japanese![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Thank you for joining me today, {f 4 2}-dono! I won't forget your kindness![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I have an aunt who lives back home. She has been helping me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I have to tell her that I've made a wonderful new tomodachi![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bebe seems really grateful.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're growing closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}But I wanted to ask you more about Nihon... I must dream a bit longer, I suppose.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}We'll continue our Japanese adventure another time! See you later, {f 4 2}-dono![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}We'll continue our Japanese adventure another time! Peace out, {f 4 2}-dono![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}We'll continue our Japanese adventure another time! Until we meet again, {f 4 2}-dono![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}We'll continue our Japanese adventure another time! I'll be back, {f 4 2}-dono![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Bebe[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
